title: Legence Announces Improved Term Loan Pricing on Credit Rating Upgrade
author: Na
description: Legence Corp. (Nasdaq: LGN) announced a repricing of its $995 million term loan credit facility following an S&P Global Ratings upgrade of its issuer credit rating to BB- from B+, with a positive outlook. The upgrade triggered a 25 basis point reduction in pricing, bringing the Term Loan rate to SOFR plus 1.75%. The company also reported record first quarter 2026 revenues of $1.04 billion, representing 105% growth year-over-year.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company received a credit rating upgrade from S&P Global Ratings (B+ to BB-) with a positive outlook, resulting in lower borrowing costs (25 basis point reduction). Additionally, the company reported record quarterly revenues of $1.04 billion with 105% year-over-year growth, demonstrating strong financial performance and operational momentum.

title: Engineering Services Stock Jumps 80% Since September IPO as $24 Million Investor Bet Emerges
author: Jonathan Ponciano
description: Legence, a Blackstone-backed engineering and technical services provider for HVAC and MEP systems, has surged 80% since its September IPO to $50.51 per share. Engle Capital Management initiated a new position with 559,000 shares worth $24.06 million in Q4, making it the firm's third-largest holding. The company reported record Q3 revenue of $708 million (up 26% YoY) and a $3.1 billion backlog, with recent acquisition of The Bowers Group expected to add $850 million in annual revenue.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Strong 80% stock appreciation since IPO, record Q3 revenue growth of 26% YoY, robust $3.1 billion backlog providing future revenue visibility, recent strategic acquisition of The Bowers Group expected to add $850 million in revenue, and significant institutional investment from Engle Capital Management all indicate strong business momentum and market confidence.

title: Legence Sets Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2025 Earnings Release Date and Webcast Schedule
author: Na
description: Legence Corp. (Nasdaq: LGN) announced it will release fourth quarter and full-year 2025 financial results on March 27, 2026, followed by an earnings conference call at 10:00 am EST. The webcast and presentation materials will be available on the company's investor relations website, with a replay available through April 27, 2026.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article is a routine announcement of earnings release and conference call scheduling. It contains no forward-looking statements, performance metrics, or information that would indicate positive or negative business developments. It is purely procedural in nature.

title: Legence Completes Acquisition of Bowers
author: Globe Newswire
description: Legence Corp. (NASDAQ:LGN) has completed its acquisition of The Bowers Group, a mechanical contractor based in Beltsville, Maryland with 40+ years of expertise. The deal involved $325 million in upfront cash consideration funded through cash on hand, revolving credit, a $200 million term loan upsizing, and approximately 2.55 million shares of Class A common stock, with an additional $50 million in deferred consideration due at the end of 2026.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company successfully completed a strategic acquisition that expands its service offerings and geographic reach. Management expressed confidence in achieving greater success through the combination, and the deal represents an important milestone in their growth strategy. The acquisition adds a well-established contractor with 40+ years of expertise to their portfolio.

title: Legence Completes Acquisition of Bowers
author: Na
description: Legence Corp. (Nasdaq: LGN) has completed its acquisition of The Bowers Group, a Maryland-based mechanical contractor with 40+ years of expertise in HVAC, plumbing, and process systems. The $325 million upfront purchase price was funded through cash, revolving credit, a $200 million term loan upsizing, and 2.55 million shares of Class A common stock, with an additional $50 million deferred consideration due at year-end 2026.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Successful completion of a strategic acquisition marks an important growth milestone. The company is expanding its service offerings and geographic reach into the Northern Virginia and DC Metro markets, which should enhance revenue and market position. CEO expressed confidence in achieving greater success through the combination.
